reviewed_head.subject: Close iteration-0005 detached review-bundle handoff, authority, and provenance gaps

review_scope.limitation: detached review closure is nearly complete, but schema replay and packet metadata closure are still incomplete

verdict.summary: The detached review bundle is near-accept, but still needs the two conversations_api schemas and the referenced packet meta/status artifacts to be fully self-consistent.

findings.summary: The two conversations_api schemas required by the validation checks are still missing from the detached archive.
The detached request-basis object still declares PLAN packet metadata and request status refs that are not bundled.
The implement packet still declares IMPLEMENT/packet.meta.json without bundling it.

next_patch_set: Open iteration-0006 for final detached-closure fixes
Bundle the two conversations_api schemas used by the validation checks
Recreate the implement review bundle with iteration-0006 identifiers
